identification: Persia (Fārs province SW Iran; heartland around Persepolis/Pasargadae)
Elam (Khūzestān SW Iran; around Susa)
Babylonia (lower Mesopotamia central/southern Iraq)
Assyria (upper Mesopotamia northern Iraq; Nineveh/Arbela region)
Arabia (northern Arabian peninsula / Syro-Arabian desert margins)
Egypt (Nile valley; centroid around Memphis/Delta)
'Those by the sea' — Phoenician/Levantine coast (mainstream reading; contested)
Lydia (western Anatolia; capital Sardis)
Ionia (Aegean coast of Anatolia + offshore Greeks)
Media (Zagros highlands NW Iran; capital Ecbatana/Hamadan)
Armenia (Armenian highland; Lake Van / Araxes basin)
Cappadocia (central-eastern Anatolian plateau)
Parthia (NE Iran; Khorāsān around Nisa/Damghan)
Drangiana (Sīstān basin SE Iran / SW Afghanistan; Helmand drainage)
Areia (Herat region western Afghanistan; Harī Rūd valley)
Chorasmia (lower Amu Darya / Khwarezm oasis Uzbekistan-Turkmenistan)
Bactria (northern Afghanistan around Balkh / upper Oxus)
Sogdia (Zerafshan valley Uzbekistan/Tajikistan; Samarkand/Bukhara)
Gandhāra (Peshawar/Kabul valleys; NW Pakistan + E Afghanistan)
Scythians (mainstream: Saka tigraxauda steppes E/NE of Sogdia; Syr Darya/Jaxartes belt)
Sattagydia (mainstream: south of Hindu Kush Ghazni/upper Indus borderland)
Arachosia (Kandahar region southern Afghanistan; Arghandab/Helmand)
Maka (mainstream: Makrān coast SE Iran / SW Pakistan)
